news.t: A vegan ETF just launched, and its holdings may surprise you

holdings.infoBox: VEGN is an equity ETF with a total of 260 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 5.53%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.24%, Apple at 4.07%, Broadcom at 3.93%, and Alphabet at 3.86%.

overview.description: The US Vegan Climate ETF (VEGN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the US Vegan Climate index. The fund seeks to track a principles-based index of U.S. equities weighted by market-cap. VEGN was launched on Sep 9, 2019 and is issued by Beyond Investing.

data.title: New Vegan ETF Starts a Food Fight in the ETF Industry
data.text: Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas and Scarlet Fu break down the U.S. Vegan Climate ETF (ticker: VEGN) with Claire Smith. CEO of Beyond Investing. The fund seeks to address the concerns of vegans, animal love...

data.title: A vegan ETF just launched, and its holdings may surprise you
data.text: The U.S. Vegan Climate ETF isn't composed of exactly what its name suggests, experts say.

data.title: A vegan ETF just launched, but its holdings may surprise you
data.text: Todd Rosenbluth, director of ETF and mutual fund research at CFRA, and Tom Lydon, editor and proprietor of ETFTrends.com, take a look at a newly listed "vegan" ETF with CNBC's Bob Pisani.
